tokens: Okay, number 1 is you'll doff suits in the LM.
Item 2 is postpone some of the LM transfer until post-sleep.
Of course, the changes that I'll read up to you will take care of some of that.
Then item 3 is we'll power down the LM and dry out the water boiler.
Item 4: be ready to close out the LM at 179:20; that's (second orbit) AOS plus 10 minutes, the next pass after docking.
Then item 5: you'll re-enter the LM tomorrow and transfer completion and LM jettison.
Item 6: you will need the LM Timeline Book and LM Contingency Checklist at docking to accomplish deactivation.
